german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility challenges.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Lead, But Core PMs Are Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A slight dominance of customer-facing roles highlights a competitive landscape among product management types.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 58% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Flexible Arrangements
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, limiting remote and hybrid options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A staggering majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 43% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
